title: mikania tehuacanensis
intro: Mikania tehuacanensis is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Mikania tehuacanensis include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress, which can contribute to chronic diseases. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various forms of administration to harness its medicinal properties.
